title: Health Update On AEW's Jake 'The Snake' Roberts Following Hip Surgery
summary: Dave Meltzer provided a health update on Jake "The Snake" Roberts following his hip surgery in the latest edition of the Wrestling Observer Newsletter.

title: AEW Dynamite (1/7) Draws Over 500,000 Viewers On Cable TV
summary: AEW Dynamite viewership and ratings information for the January 7th episode Dave Meltzer of the Wrestling Observer reports that AEW Dynamite on January 7, drew 516,000 on TBS. This number is up from...

title: Some Within AEW Were Unhappy Regarding Recent MJF Promo
summary: Some within AEW weren't happy with a line in MJF's return promo during a December edition of "AEW Dynamite," according to a new report.

title: Kris Statlander And Babes Of Wrath to Face Hyan, Maya World, and Vert Vixen On 1/10 AEW Collision
